name: Sky Century Investment, Inc.
business: Sky Century Investment, Inc. generates revenue from two primary business lines: IT Services (technical support and server leasing) and the sale of RSS feeds and podcasts about cannabis news. As of August 31, 2025, RSS feeds and podcasts accounted for 89% of total revenue, while IT services contributed 11%. The company also operates a Cannabis News mobile application and marketing services, neither of which currently generate revenue.

exposures.sentence: The first primary business line of the Sky Century Investment, Inc. is IT Services. This segment primarily involves: 1) Technical Support: the Company provides to clients ongoing technical support, including maintenance, troubleshooting, and system upgrades, minimizing downtime and optimizing operational efficiency for clients; 2) Server Leasing: the Company offers leased high-performance servers to clients, enabling them to scale operations without significant upfront capital investment.
Another aspect of the Company’s business operations represents the selling of RSS feeds and Podcasts.
The marketing division provides services such as internet marketing and a podcast directory, which are not generating revenue at this time.
The Company’s Cannabis News application is not commercially viable at this stage, and the Company`s marketing efforts have yet to yield any revenue.

catalysts.event: Enhance and expand marketing and IT services offerings
catalysts.sentence: The Company expects to enhance and expand these services by the end of 2026.
